blocks: Sprint 3+ polish — M4 perf validation across sessions

stories.design_open_question: localStorage (single-device) vs SQLite backend (cross-device via STORY-007)? PM recommends **SQLite backend** to satisfy M4 cross-device clause; localStorage fails the cross-device criterion. Architect decides at sizing.

notes: Proposed scope = 23 SP. Comfortable buffer for unplanned work + ceremony time + on-call. Capacity for chore work (Issue #46/#47 implementation, #65 FastAPI/uvicorn reclassification, #45 STATUS block as action driver) is separate and not in this PM-authored backlog. Sprint 2 retro of Sprint 1 is a sprint-ceremony artifact (not a feature story).
